narrative:
Westerville 2-D (precinct in Franklin County) has 637 registered voters, with 46.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.6%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.9 percentage points.
